description: Returns a specified Checklist Item Response Set.

name.description: The name of the Item Response Set

active.description: Indicates whether an Item Response Set is available for use.

created_at.description: Represents when an Item Response Set was created

updated_at.description: Represents when a Item Response Set was last updated

in_use.description: Indicates whether a Response Set is being used by an Inspection Template Item

deletable.description: Indicates whether a Response Set is deletable.

procore_standard.description: Indicates whether a Response Set is a Procore standard set.
